message:
feat(core,server): enhanced resource handling, session management, and middleware hooks

Refine auth context handling in fastmcp-core for cleaner request-scoped
access patterns. Expand server with major improvements to resource
resolution and listing, session lifecycle management, and tool execution
robustness. Add new middleware hook points for finer-grained request
interception. Improve router logic for resource template matching and
URI resolution. Add extensive test coverage for resource handling,
middleware hooks, and auth flows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
